name: display sentinel: 'pacing advisory' system term in prose fires debug_leak

source.purpose: Playthrough 10 turn 14 leaked the system term 'pacing advisory' into player-facing prose: 'The pacing advisory fires in the back of your mind…'. Same class as scene_packet/archivist/etc. — system vocabulary that should never reach the player. Added to FORBIDDEN_PHRASES.

narrator.prose: The yard stretches before you. The pacing advisory fires in the back of your mind — you have maybe an hour before Calder closes that window.
